plans.objective: Replace the simulation loop in `server/server.js` with real `modbus-serial` and `net-snmp` integrations to fetch data from PDUs, UPS, and CRAC units.
Expand the `envData` model to include Airflow, Air Pressure, Smoke, and Water Leak contact closure sensors on both the backend generator and frontend UI views.
Implement backend logic to detect threshold breaches (e.g., high temp, water leak) and push real-time alerts to the frontend with distinct severity levels.
Integrate a time-series database (e.g., InfluxDB) to store historical sensor data, replacing the transient array memory logic in `server.js`.
